Manages button combinations and implements the "Recovery First Use" app for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[getting_started_button_combo.c](getting_started_button_combo.c.md)**: Manages button combinations for initiating actions like factory reset and manufacturing mode.
- **[getting_started_button_combo.h](getting_started_button_combo.h.md)**: Monitors button combinations for specific actions like invoking callbacks or entering modes.
- **[recovery_first_use_app.c](recovery_first_use_app.c.md)**: Implements the "Recovery First Use" app for Pebble firmware, managing UI and Bluetooth connections.
- **[recovery_first_use_app.h](recovery_first_use_app.h.md)**: Defines a function to get application information for the recovery first use app.
